markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Stan Wawrinka wins set 4 in the Stan Wawrinka vs Matteo Berrettini professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Stan Wawrinka vs Matteo Berrettini professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
markets.title: Will Stan Wawrinka win set 4 in the Stan Wawrinka vs Matteo Berrettini match

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Colson Montgomery records 2+ hits in the Chicago WS vs Baltimore professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 30, 2026 at 6:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Colson Montgomery is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Colson Montgomery starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Colson Montgomery is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Colson Montgomery is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Colson Montgomery: 2+ hits?
